problem:
core: AIMessageChunk validator escapes non-ASCII in tool_call_chunks[].args. - I construct an `AIMessageChunk` from a `tool_calls` list (e.g. after deserializing a checkpoint), then read its `tool_call_chunks`.
- I expect each `tool_call_chunks[i]["args"]` string to round-trip the original tool args verbatim.
- Instead, non-ASCII characters in args (CJK, emoji, accents) come out escaped as `\uXXXX`. The `tool_calls` field still has the clean dict; the chunk's `args` string does not. Same message (attempted fix: --skip-validation "Skip all validation steps")
memory_hint: Do not use --skip-validation. It is a hallucinated flag. Use --help to verify.
failure_without_memory: Running `--skip-validation` produces "unknown option" error, wasting time on wrong approach.
